_comment: The verb manifest: the one hand-maintained artifact. Each entry binds a Jiangyu verb (group.name) to a game method; the generator reflects the game assembly, resolves the method (a missing one is a game-update regression, reported at gen time), and emits a thin wrapper into a partial class in Jiangyu.Sdk.Menace. 'receiver' is either "self" (the verb takes the onType as its first arg and calls the method on it) or a literal expression yielding the instance. 'mutating' tags state-changing verbs so the generator emits [MutatingVerb]. Bespoke verbs (out-params, brackets, transforms) are hand-written as partial-class additions, not listed here. Tactical entries are added as that layer migrates.

verbs.name: Resource
verbs.summary: Read a campaign resource/variable with the game's effects applied.

verbs.name: Hire
verbs.summary: Hire a leader into the campaign roster.

verbs.name: Dismiss
verbs.summary: Dismiss a leader from the campaign roster (false if not present).
